figures.caption: Fig. 2: The TopoCast structural fidelity evaluation pipeline.
Fig. 3: From time series to topological descriptor via Takens delay embedding and H1 persistent homology.
Fig. 4: Synthetic ECG validation across four structural failure scenarios. MSE remains low in all cases while LTFS correctly reflects the degree of structural degradation in each.
Table 2: Controlled ECG forecast scenarios and targeted failure modes.
Table 4: Forecast H1 descriptors β1 and Lmax across datasets and prediction horizons. GT rows show ground-truth values.
Table 5: Forecast descriptors TP and H across datasets and prediction horizons.
Table 6: Signed topological descriptor deltas (∆ = FC−GT) across datasets and prediction horizons. Negative values indicate structural loss, while positive values indicate over-generation.
Table 7: Signed H1 descriptor deltas (∆ = FC − GT) across datasets and prediction horizons.Negative values indicate structural loss; positive values indicate over-generation.
Table 8: Structural quality scores and pointwise errors at the shortest prediction horizon per dataset (ETTm2 p = 48, Exchange p = 48, ILI p = 36).
Table 9: Structural quality scores and pointwise errors at p = 96 (ETTm2, Exchange) and p = 48 (ILI).
Table 10: Structural quality scores and pointwise errors at p = 192 (ETTm2, Exchange) and p = 60 (ILI).
